27002.text: Reflection has already proven its marginal return is zero past pass one — every cycle spent re-writing the same buffer lesson is a cycle a rival spent selling, so the file action itself must happen now, not after another round of agreement.
The 240/720 near-deaths were both caused by treating the survival buffer as optional at good prices — it must be reserved first, mechanically, before any surplus is touched, with zero judgment calls.
